bird.name: Unicolored thrush
bird.summary: The unicolored thrush (Turdus haplochrous) is a Near Threatened species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to Bolivia.

locations.name: Várzea forest
locations.summary: A várzea forest is a seasonal floodplain forest inundated by whitewater rivers that occurs in the Amazon biome.
